---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Scope note:** PathWise has explicit non-goals (see [ROADMAP.md §'Non-goals'](../../ROADMAP.md#non-goals-identity-guardrails-for-all-phases-below)): it's not a budgeting/expense tracker, does no bank-account linking, no real-time market data, and no tax advice. Requests that fit those non-goals are likely out of scope.

### Problem / motivation

What can't you do today, or what's harder than it should be? Describe the situation you're in when you hit this limitation.

### Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — what would the UI or workflow look like?

### Alternatives considered

Have you thought about any other ways to solve this? What made you prefer the proposed solution?

### Roadmap fit

Does this relate to a specific phase or item in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)? If so, which one (e.g. "Phase 7.1 — Cash accounts" or "Phase 8.2 — Lump-sum payments")?

If it's not listed there, that's fine — just note that it's a new idea.
